message:
fix(connector,remote,sdk): strengthen transcript comparison, BOCPD model dispatch, fault harness observability, and verifier replay fidelity

activation_pipeline.rs:
- transcripts_match() now compares error messages and timestamps in
  addition to stage name and success flag, catching cases where two
  transcripts had the same outcome but different failure reasons or
  timing that should be treated as distinct activation paths.

bocpd.rs:
- Refactored run-length-zero stat reset to dispatch on the active
  observation model (Gaussian/Poisson/Categorical) via match instead
  of unconditionally resetting all three stat vectors. The previous
  code was correct but wasteful and misleading — it reset stats for
  models that were never configured, masking bugs where the wrong
  model's stats could accidentally be read.

bpet_migration_gate.rs:
- Removed stray blank line left from prior cleanup (whitespace only).

virtual_transport_faults.rs:
- Added NaN/Infinity rejection to FaultConfig::validate() for all
  probability fields via is_finite() checks.
- Added logical consistency validations: reorder_max_depth must be >0
  when reorder_probability >0, and corrupt_bit_count must be >0 when
  corrupt_probability >0.
- Added FaultSchedule::fault_at() for O(log n) binary search lookup
  replacing the O(n) linear scan in process_message().
- Campaign now actually executes the fault schedule: processes each
  message through the schedule, flushes the reorder buffer, computes
  per-message payload hashes, and includes delivered message count in
  the content hash. Previously the content hash was derived only from
  the schedule definition, not the actual execution trace.
- Added FAULT_SCHEDULE_CREATED, FAULT_INJECTED, and
  FAULT_SCENARIO_END audit events for full campaign observability.
- Added campaign execution and reorder-buffer flush tests.

verifier_sdk.rs:
- format_version check now delegates to replay_capsule::is_version_supported()
  for single-source-of-truth version validation.
- environment_present check now also requires a non-empty platform
  field, preventing capsules with runtime_version but no platform from
  passing verification.
- Replay verification now delegates to replay_capsule::replay()
  instead of reimplementing hash computation inline, ensuring SDK
  verification cannot drift from the shared replay semantics.
- Binding hash now covers the full canonical JSON capsule serialization
  (via replay_capsule::to_canonical_json) rather than just capsule_id,
  format_version, and input count — so any capsule field change
  (including environment) produces a different binding hash.
- Reformatted include_str! macros and const declarations for
  readability.
- Added tests: empty platform fails verification, and binding hash
  changes when environment differs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
